title: Bitdeer Stock Slide on Dilution Fears from Convertible Offering
text: Bitdeer Technologies Group stock tumbled 17% following announcement of a $300 million convertible notes offering in February 2026. Investors reacted negatively to the dilution risk created by convertible securities. The offering included concurrent equity component that further diluted existing shareholders. However, Bitdeer characterized the offering as necessary for aggressive expansion plans. The capital raised supports the company's transformation into an integrated AI and Bitcoin mining infrastructure provider. Management emphasized that convertible note proceeds would fund high-return projects including the Tydal AI data center and Rockdale power expansion. The negative market reaction reflected near-term dilution concerns, though the proceeds enable execution of growth strategy. Bitdeer's subsequent Q1 2026 results showing AI Cloud revenue reaching $69 million ARR suggest the capital deployment decision justified the dilution from investors' long-term perspective.
